Container.Name: Binventory
Container.Overview: Binventory — visual storage bin tracker built for Costco-style totes. See your entire rack at a glance with a visual shelf display. Search items across all bins instantly, add photos to items, print QR code labels, and add items by voice/Siri shortcut. Configurable rack layout (rows × columns), custom lid color types, and MCP integration so Claude AI can query your bins.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Binventory web interface.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Stores the SQLite database (bin-inventory.db) and item photos. Back this folder up to preserve your data.
